name: KPainter OpenClaw
description: Create KPainter explainer videos, slides, images, and interactive lessons from OpenClaw. Latest image support includes GPT-Image-2.

tools.name: kpainter_get_create_catalog
tools.description: Fetch KPainter languages, voices, and visual-style catalog data.

tools.name: kpainter_get_me
tools.description: Fetch the current KPainter user profile.

tools.name: kpainter_get_credit_balance
tools.description: Fetch current KPainter credits and subscription balance.

tools.name: kpainter_create_knowledge
tools.description: Create a KPainter explainer video, slides, image, or interactive lesson.

tools.name: kpainter_list_knowledge
tools.description: List the current user's KPainter creations.

tools.name: kpainter_get_knowledge
tools.description: Fetch one KPainter creation by knowledge id.

tools.name: kpainter_get_job_status
tools.description: Fetch KPainter job status by job id.

tools.name: kpainter_get_knowledge_status
tools.description: Fetch KPainter knowledge status by knowledge id.
